final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing logo for a tech-lifestyle content creator covering EVs, gadgets, and daily essentials.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, universal minimalist aesthetic, works across Chinese and Western social platforms
Subject: abstract geometric mark suggesting energy flow and connectivity, balanced with modern sans-serif wordmark
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, scalable for circular crop (profile picture format)
Color palette: neutral base (deep charcoal or warm gray) with one accent color (electric blue or amber), monochrome version must work
Constraints: must read clearly at 32x32 favicon and 400x400 profile picture; monochrome version must work without color; no culturally sensitive symbols or colors; avoid imagery that could offend religious, political, or regional groups
Avoid: national flags or patriotic symbols; religious iconography; hand gestures; animal symbols with cultural baggage; complex gradients; photorealistic elements; trendy design clichés that date quickly
